% !TEX program = xelatex
% Compile from a workspace containing common/resume.cls: xelatex resume.tex
\documentclass{common/resume}
\RequirePackage{xeCJK}
\IfFontExistsTF{Microsoft YaHei}{
  \setCJKmainfont{Microsoft YaHei}
  \setCJKsansfont{Microsoft YaHei}
  \setCJKmonofont{Microsoft YaHei}
}{\IfFontExistsTF{Noto Sans SC}{
  \setCJKmainfont{Noto Sans SC}
  \setCJKsansfont{Noto Sans SC}
  \setCJKmonofont{Noto Sans SC}
}{}}
% For private local builds, optional Noto font files may live under work/common/fonts/NotoSansSC/.
% Do not commit font files unless their license has been reviewed and documented.
% If using the external font helper from the generated workspace, copy it under work/common/ and input it there.
\begin{document}

\resumeName{\placeholder{姓名}}
\resumeContact{\placeholder{邮箱} \quad | \quad \placeholder{电话} \quad | \quad \placeholder{城市} \quad | \quad \placeholder{个人主页/LinkedIn}}

\resumeSection{个人简介}
\placeholder{2-3 行简介，只使用已确认事实。}

\resumeSection{教育背景}
\datedEntry{\placeholder{学校}，\placeholder{学位/专业}}{\placeholder{时间}}
\placeholder{奖项、绩点、导师或论文题目仅在已确认时填写。}

\resumeSection{实习/项目经历}
\datedEntry{\placeholder{职位/项目}，\placeholder{公司/机构}}{\placeholder{时间}}
\begin{itemize}
  \item \placeholder{使用已确认的行动、技术、范围和结果写成的要点。}
  \item \placeholder{不补写未经确认的指标、头衔、日期或职责。}
\end{itemize}

\resumeSection{技能}
\placeholder{编程语言：...} \quad \placeholder{工具/框架：...} \quad \placeholder{语言：...}

\resumeSection{其他}
\placeholder{获奖、证书、开源、论文或作品集，只保留与目标相关且已确认的信息。}

\end{document}
